# GPTSearchBoost

> GEO agency that optimizes local service businesses to get recommended by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini.

## Services

- [AI Search Audit & Visibility Analysis](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Deep-dive analysis of brand presence across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews — maps every gap and opportunity.
- [AI Content Optimization](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Rewrites and restructures content so ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI recommend your business when customers search.
- [Structured Data & Schema](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Advanced schema markup, entity optimization, and knowledge graph signals that help AI models cite your business with confidence.
- [Authority Building & Digital PR](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Builds AI citations and brand mentions across authoritative sources that make ChatGPT and Google AI trust and recommend your business.
- [Technical GEO](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Technical site optimization for AI crawler accessibility, indexability, and structured data that AI engines rely on.
- [GEO Score Monitoring](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Tracks AI citation frequency, GEO score, and brand mention growth across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI with monthly dashboards.

## Process

- [5-Step GEO Process](https://gptsearchboost.com/#process): Our proven process — AI Search Audit, Content & Schema Optimization, Technical GEO Setup, AI Citation & Authority Building, and ongoing GEO Score Monitoring.

## About

- [What is GEO](https://gptsearchboost.com/#geo): Explains Generative Engine Optimization — how AI search differs from traditional SEO, why it matters, and how GPTSearchBoost gives businesses a competitive advantage.
- [The Opportunity](https://gptsearchboost.com/#opportunity): 40% of searches are now AI-answered. $2.1T in AI-driven revenue by 2027. 3.5x more visibility for GEO-optimized businesses vs non-optimized competitors.

## Contact

- [Book a Call](https://gptsearchboost.com/#book-call): Schedule a free 30-minute AI search strategy session via Calendly. Includes AI visibility audit, competitor analysis, and custom GEO roadmap.
- [Send a Message](https://gptsearchboost.com/#contact): Contact form for inquiries. Free AI visibility audit included, response within 24 hours, no contracts or commitment required.

## FAQ

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://gptsearchboost.com/#faq): Covers SEO vs GEO differences, timeline for results (60-90 days for initial improvements), AI platform optimization, pricing, and working with small and local businesses.

## Open Source

- [Free GEO Tools on GitHub](https://github.com/zubair-trabzada/geo-seo-claude): Open-source GEO toolkit including GEO Audit Suite, AI Citation Scorer, and llms.txt Generator — free tools for AI search optimization.

## Key Facts

- GPTSearchBoost.com is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency
- Specializes in local service businesses — law firms, med spas, dentists, real estate teams, luxury home services
- Optimizes for ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Copilot
- Covers SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and GEO under one roof
- Free 30-minute strategy sessions with no obligation
- Clear pricing proposals delivered within 48 hours
- Measurable AI search visibility improvements within 60-90 days
- Open-source GEO tools available on GitHub
